name: wa-server
description: 3oNs Digital - Local API server for WhatsApp and Email automations (No Canvas - Windows Compatible)

scripts.prestart: powershell -Command "try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ('Killed PID: ' + $_.OwningProcess) } } catch {}" || echo 'Port cleanup done'
